metadata.description: Single-plugin marketplace for the Oracle AI Data Platform Fusion Bundle Claude Code plugin.

plugins.name: oracle-ai-data-platform-fusion-bundle
plugins.description: Productized Fusion → AIDP pipeline: curated BICC extracts, medallion bronze/silver/gold, conformed dimensions, gold marts, and OAC workbooks installable via OAC REST API. End-user consumption via OAC MCP Preview in Claude/Cline/Copilot.
